videos.headline: Ashton Jeanty restores Boise State's lead with TD on 4th-and-goal
videos.description: Ashton Jeanty breaks the plane for his first touchdown of the game as Boise State retakes the lead over UNLV.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ashton Jeanty restores Boise State's lead with TD on 4th-and-goal) 2024/10/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kaleo Ballungay hauls it in for 9-yard receiving touchdown
videos.description: Kaleo Ballungay hauls it in for 9-yard receiving touchdown

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kaleo Ballungay hauls it in for 9-yard receiving touchdown) 2024/10/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Boise State strike twice at the end of the first half to jump in front
videos.description: Maddux Madsen keeps it for a rushing touchdown before finding Matt Lauter in the end zone to extend Boise State's lead before halftime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Boise State strike twice at the end of the first half to jump in front) 2024/10/26 ESHEET
